===Pokémon===

|desc={{p|Salazzle}} is Plumeria's only known Pokémon. She first appeared in ''[[SM129|Battle Royal 151!]]'', where she battled [[Ilima]] and his {{p|Eevee}} during the [[Manalo Conference]], but was defeated.

She briefly reappeared in ''[[SM146|Thank You, Alola! The Journey Continues!]]'', where she was watching [[Guzma]] training with his underlings alongside her Trainer.

Salazzle's known moves are {{m|Sludge Wave}}, {{m|Dragon Claw}}, and {{m|Dragon Pulse}}.}}
